    Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.algebras that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Matrix
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MatrixLieAlgebra<E>
    A concrete Lie Algebra where elements are square matrices and the bracket is the commutator [A, B] = AB - BA.

    Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.groups that implement interfaces with type arguments of type Matrix
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    LieGroup
    A Lie group is a group that is also a differentiable manifold.
    class 
    SO3_1Group
    The group of all linear transformations of Minkowski space that preserve the spacetime interval dsÃ‚Â²=-cÃ‚Â²dtÃ‚Â²+dxÃ‚Â²+dyÃ‚Â²+dzÃ‚Â².
    class 
    SU2Group
    The group of 2x2 unitary matrices with determinant 1.
    class 
    SU3Group
    The group of 3x3 unitary matrices with determinant 1.

  • Uses of Matrix in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices

    Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices that implement Matrix
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DenseMatrix<E>
    A dense matrix implementation.
    class 
    GenericMatrix<E>
    A generic matrix implementation with smart storage and provider selection.
    class 
    MMapMatrix
    Memory-Mapped Matrix implementation for Out-of-Core processing.
    class 
    RealDoubleMatrix
    A specialized Matrix implementation for Doubles with SIMD and Native optimization.
    class 
    SIMDRealDoubleMatrix
    SIMD-accelerated Matrix implementation using JDK Vector API.
    class 
    SparseMatrix<E>
    A sparse matrix implementation.
    class 
    TiledMatrix
    A matrix decomposed into smaller tiles (blocks).

    Description
    static CholeskyDecomposition
    CholeskyDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix)
    Computes Cholesky decomposition A = LL^T.
    static EigenDecomposition
    EigenDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix)
    Computes eigendecomposition using default simplified algorithm.
    static EigenDecomposition
    EigenDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix, EigenDecomposition.Algorithm algo)
    Computes eigendecomposition using QR algorithm and specified eigenvector method.
    static LUDecomposition
    LUDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix)
    Computes LU decomposition with partial pivoting.
    static QRDecomposition
    QRDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix)
    Computes QR decomposition using Gram-Schmidt.
    static SVDDecomposition
    SVDDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix)
    Computes SVD using the default approximation (ATA_APPROXIMATION).
    static SVDDecomposition
    SVDDecomposition.decompose(Matrix<Real> matrix, SVDDecomposition.Algorithm algo)
    Computes SVD using the specified algorithm.
    static boolean
    MatrixSolver.isLikelyPositiveDefinite(Matrix<Real> A)
    Checks if a matrix is likely positive definite using diagonal dominance heuristic.
    static boolean
    MatrixSolver.isSymmetric(Matrix<Real> A)
    Checks if a matrix is symmetric.
    static MatrixSolver.Strategy
    MatrixSolver.recommend(Matrix<Real> A)
    Recommends the best solver strategy for the given matrix.
    static Real[]
    MatrixSolver.solve(Matrix<Real> A, Real[] b)
    Solves Ax = b with automatic algorithm selection.
    static Real[]
    MatrixSolver.solve(Matrix<Real> A, Real[] b, MatrixSolver.Strategy strategy)
    Solves Ax = b with explicit algorithm selection.

  • Uses of Matrix in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices.solvers.sparse

    Methods in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices.solvers.sparse with parameters of type Matrix
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Real[]
    BiCGSTAB.solve(Matrix<Real> A, Real[] b, Real[] x0, Real tolerance, int maxIterations)
    Solves Ax = b using BiCGSTAB.
    static Real[]
    ConjugateGradient.solve(Matrix<Real> A, Real[] b, Real[] x0, Real tolerance, int maxIterations)
    Solves Ax = b using Conjugate Gradient.
    static Real[]
    GMRES.solve(Matrix<Real> A, Real[] b, Real[] x0, Real tolerance, int maxIterations, int restarts)
    Solves Ax = b using GMRES with restarts.

    Method
    Description
    Matrix<Complex>
    QuantumAlgorithmProvider.stateTomography(QuantumBackend.QuantumCircuit circuit, int shots)
    Performs quantum state tomography to reconstruct a density matrix.
    Methods in org.jscience.core.technical.backend.quantum with parameters of type Matrix
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    QuantumBackend.QuantumCircuit
    QuantumAlgorithmProvider.matrixToUnitary(Matrix<Complex> matrix)
    Converts a classical matrix to a quantum unitary operator.
    QuantumBackend.QuantumResult

    Performs Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA).
    double
    QuantumAlgorithmProvider.quantumPhaseEstimation(Matrix<Complex> unitary, Vector<Complex> eigenstate, int precision)
    Performs Quantum Phase Estimation (QPE).
    double
    QuantumAlgorithmProvider.vqe(Matrix<Complex> hamiltonian, QuantumBackend.QuantumCircuit ansatz, String optimizer)
    Performs Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) to find ground state energy.
